summary: Verified footer logo fix (object-contain, h-12 sm:h-14 w-auto). Full lockup now renders without cropping. Nav logo still working. Note: 'aurrum-landing' wrapper NOT present in DOM.

issues: Tagline 'READ THE MARKET. TRADE THE EDGE.' is technically legible but very small at h-14 (56px total height, tagline row ~8-11px). If greater tagline emphasis is desired, consider h-16 or h-20.

aurrum_landing_wrapper.note: No element with class containing 'aurrum-landing' found in DOM. Request asked to confirm it exists — reporting as missing.

action_items: (Optional) Increase footer logo size (e.g., h-16 sm:h-20) if the tagline 'READ THE MARKET. TRADE THE EDGE.' needs to be more readable — currently ~8-11px tall.
Verify whether the 'aurrum-landing' wrapper is required. It is not present in the rendered DOM.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer logo fix verified: 280x56px, object-contain, full 5:1 lockup with tagline rendering correctly. Nav logo intact. Only cosmetic note is tagline is small at h-14.
